scripts.deploy: export SENTRY_RELEASE=${SENTRY_RELEASE:-$(sentry-cli releases propose-version)} && wrangler deploy --outdir dist-worker --upload-source-maps --var SENTRY_RELEASE:$SENTRY_RELEASE && bun run sentry:sourcemaps
scripts.sentry:release: sentry-cli releases info "$SENTRY_RELEASE" >/dev/null 2>&1 || sentry-cli releases new "$SENTRY_RELEASE"
scripts.sentry:sourcemaps: bun run sentry:release && sentry-cli sourcemaps upload --release="$SENTRY_RELEASE" --strip-prefix "$PWD" dist-worker && sentry-cli releases finalize "$SENTRY_RELEASE"
